name: michaelericksonh5-plugins
description: High 5 Games Claude Code plugins — AI video generation, slot machine art creation, and skill auditing.

plugins.name: ai-video-generator
plugins.description: AI video generation for Claude — Veo 3.1 (fal.ai + Gemini), Happy Horse (Alibaba), and Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance). Text-to-video, image-to-video, first+last frame, reference images, video extension.

plugins.name: slot-art-creator-node
plugins.description: Generate, QA, and resize mobile slot machine art — symbols, UI, backgrounds, key art. Numbered workflow (slot-00 through slot-10), persistent project memory, Gemini + fal.ai dual backend.

plugins.name: skill-auditor
plugins.description: Audits a Claude Code skill against an 8-dimension quality rubric. READY / NEEDS WORK / DRAFT verdict with actionable findings.
